_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Moreover, Rolipram treatment suppressed tumor cell proliferation (Figure 5D), but had no effect on tumor cell apoptosis as measured by TUNEL staining (data not shown).
details: Rolipram treatment suppressed tumor cell proliferation but had no effect on tumor cell apoptosis
